_description: REI-D1 Static Reference Corpus — 30 frozen arXiv papers for scientific literature evaluation. Immutable artifact for reproducible benchmarking.
_snapshot_source: arXiv API v2 — categories cs.AI, cs.CL, physics, q-bio
_selection_method: Programmatic filter (200 candidates) → manual curation (30 selected) across 3 complexity gates

quantitative_claims.description: Explicit numerical results, tables, statistical tests, p-values

long_reasoning_chains.description: Conclusion depends on 5+ sequential logical steps

biomedical.description: q-bio papers, GPQA biology overlap, Alberta Innovates alignment

cs_ai.description: cs.AI/cs.CL papers, routing and architecture evaluation

physics.description: physics papers, GPQA physics overlap, high-uncertainty reasoning

evaluation_conditions.C4_naive: Full context per turn, no HCM, no CARDO GUARD — baseline token count and cost
evaluation_conditions.C1_full_rei: Cached prefix + sliding window + deterministic Layer 0 — token savings vs C4
evaluation_conditions.C3_guard: C1 + CARDO GUARD active — hallucination catch rate, false positive rate
evaluation_conditions.synthesis: C1 + HCM hierarchical compression — ROUGE/BERTScore on Related Work generation

metrics.token_efficiency: Token count delta (C1 vs C4), cost savings percentage, cache hit rate
metrics.guard_accuracy: Hallucination catch rate, false positive rate, precision/recall (C3 vs C4)
metrics.synthesis_quality: ROUGE-L, BERTScore, human evaluation on extracted Related Work section
metrics.routing_accuracy: Pathway selection correctness, escalation rate, confidence score distribution
